risk_rationale: The Kids PRIVACY Act introduces new requirements for handling personal information of minors, which are not fully aligned with TikTok's current baseline. The need for express consent and the ability for minors or their parents to access, correct, or delete personal information are significant changes that require immediate attention.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: TikTok Privacy Policy (non-US / global page) last updated 2025-07-08
compliance_gaps.regulatory_requirement: Requires express consent before processing certain personal information of individuals under 18
compliance_gaps.gap_description: Current policy does not explicitly require express consent for processing minors' personal information.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: TikTok US Privacy Policy last updated 2024-08-19
compliance_gaps.regulatory_requirement: Allows minors or their parents to access, correct, or delete personal information
compliance_gaps.gap_description: Current policy does not provide explicit mechanisms for minors or their parents to access, correct, or delete personal information.

remediations.title: Implement Express Consent Mechanism
remediations.description: Develop and integrate a mechanism to obtain express consent from minors or their parents before processing personal information.
acceptance_criteria: Express consent is obtained and logged for all users under 18
Consent mechanism is compliant with Kids PRIVACY Act requirements

remediations.title: Enhance Data Access and Correction Features
remediations.description: Create features that allow minors or their parents to access, correct, or delete personal information as required by the Kids PRIVACY Act.
acceptance_criteria: Users under 18 and their parents can access, correct, or delete personal information
Features are compliant with Kids PRIVACY Act requirements

business_impact: Failure to comply with the Kids PRIVACY Act could result in significant legal penalties and reputational damage, impacting user trust and platform credibility.
recommended_actions: Initiate a legal review to fully understand the implications of the Kids PRIVACY Act.
Prioritize the development of consent and data access features to align with new regulatory requirements.
Engage with stakeholders to communicate changes and ensure smooth implementation.
